item.title: MCP Gateway Internals for Tool-Using Agents
item.snippet: A deep technical analysis of an MCP gateway, request routing, tool contracts, and one Google Cloud Docs knowledge tool section.
item.content:
This article explains the internals of an MCP gateway for tool-using agents and how request routing, tool contracts, and capability boundaries work.

## Architecture
The gateway sits between agent callers and tool adapters.

## MCP Gateway
The MCP gateway coordinates tool calls, request routing, and capability boundaries.

## OAuth Tokens
OAuth token exchange protects one delegated access flow in the gateway.

## Policy Enforcement
Security and authorization rules are applied before tool execution.

## Google Cloud Docs (Knowledge Tool)
One knowledge tool uses Google Cloud Docs as a document source.

The MCP gateway appears throughout the article as the central mechanism. Security and authorization are supporting technical concerns. Cloud is mentioned mostly in the knowledge tool section.
